top_signals.title: US Treasury issues sanctions on Iran, targets 4 crypto exchanges
top_signals.summary: The sanctions come four days after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US had seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iranian crypto exchanges and wallets since late February.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls below $66K as US and Iran launch new strikes
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin saw its largest daily drop since early February on Tuesday as the cryptocurrency shed more than $4,500 in a single day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: California natural gas prices reach historic lows in early 2026
top_signals.summary: Monthly average natural gas spot prices in California reached record lows in the first five months of 2026, dropping to values last recorded in the nationwide low-price market of 2024. Record lows were recorded in Northern California's PG&E Citygate and Southern California's SoCal Border Average; SoCal Citygate prices fell to near-record lows but remained higher than some 2024 prices. Several factors contribute to California's low prices, including above-average inventories and decreasing in-state demand for natural gas-fired electricity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) falls 10.7%, leading index lower
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Zambia Set for Talks With Bondholders Blocking Its Debt Buyback
top_signals.summary: Zambia’s government is heading to the negotiating table after a group of bondholders blocked its attempt to buy back a $1.36 billion bond before a potentially costly coupon increase.

top_signals.title: Kpler Announces Strategic Growth Equity Investment from Sixth Street
top_signals.summary: Kpler, a leading provider of global physical trade intelligence data and analytics, today announced it has secured a minority strategic growth equity investment of over $1 billion from Sixth Street, a leading global investment firm. As part of the transaction, management will remain majority owners of the business, Insight Partners will remain a shareholder and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Harbor Acquires CE Global Partners, Expanding HCM Advisory Practice with Specialist HR and Payroll Transformation Capabilities
top_signals.summary: Acquisition deepens Harbor's ability to support law firms and corporate law departments across the full arc of workforce modernization, and expands its presence in the UK

top_signals.title: Fasanara Capital Launches Investment Platform for Ferrari-backed Lending
top_signals.summary: The platform draws on an investment partnership featuring Fasanara, Giacomo Mattioli of Ferrari Beverly Hills / Mattioli Automotive Group and Enzo Mattioli Ferrari Announcing the launch of the Fasanara Ferrari Lending Platform and Fasanara Ferrari Strategy: Owner’s Circle A first-of-its-kind investment platform combining Ferrari-backed lending, active collector-car value creation, and exclusive access to the global Ferrari lifestyle With seed capital from the ONE Fasanara (F-ONE) multi-strategy investment platform
